name: Supermemory Auto-Recall/Capture v2
description: Full supermemory-driven memory: auto-recall via before_prompt_build, full conversation capture (user + assistant), compaction hook, and registered agent tools (memory_save/recall/forget).

autoRecall.description: Auto-recall relevant context from supermemory before each response

autoCapture.description: Auto-capture ALL conversation messages (user + assistant) to supermemory. Supermemory decides what to remember.

maxQueryLength.description: Max characters to use from user message as recall query

maxContextChars.description: Max characters of recalled context to inject

maxCaptureChars.description: Max characters per capture payload sent to supermemory

containerTag.description: Optional supermemory project/container tag for scoping memories

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically search supermemory and inject relevant context before each response (uses before_prompt_build hook)

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture (Full)
autoCapture.help: Send ALL conversation content (user + assistant) to supermemory after each exchange. No filtering — supermemory decides what to remember.

maxCaptureChars.label: Max Capture Chars
maxCaptureChars.help: Maximum characters per conversation capture sent to supermemory
